use_cases: Display reading progress on blog posts or articles
Show scroll position on long-form content pages
Indicate page navigation progress in multi-step onboarding
Visual feedback for document or page traversal
Progress indication for scannable content-heavy websites
ai_summary: A highly customizable scroll progress bar component that displays reading or scroll progress at the top or bottom of the viewport. Built with framer-motion for smooth spring-based animations and supports multiple gradient variants, sizes, and glow effects to match various design systems.
